_publications._publicationTitle: ALTERED CALCIUM CURRENTS AND AXONAL GROWTH IN Nf1 HAPLOINSUFFICIENT MICE.

_contextSnippet: At 5–7 DIV, the Ca2+ current density was ~75% higher in neurons from Nf1+/− wild-type mice: 37.7 ± 4.2 (n=9) versus versus 21.5 ± 3.7 (n=10) pA pF−1 (Vt=0 mV, p <0.05, Student's t-test).
details: Ca2+ current density was ~75% higher in neurons from Nf1+/- mice: 37.7 ± 4.2 (n=9) versus 21.5 ± 3.7 (n=10) pA pF−1 (Vt=0 mV, p<0.05)
